text:
Created attachment 249905
Poudriere Build Log

OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=NLS

OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=PGSQL                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SQLITE3
